title: Garage Sale Listing
text:
## Garage Sale Listing

**Title:** {adjective} {plural noun} Must Go!

**When:** {day of week} from {number} AM to {number} PM

**Where:** {number} {place} Street

**Highlights:**
- {adjective} {object} (works if you {verb} it gently)
- Box of {color} {clothing item} items, size {silly word}
- Vintage {vehicle} part still smells like {food}

**Free item:** One {animal} poster with {adjective} frame

**Payment:** Cash, {plural noun}, or polite {emotion}

**Note:** No early birds unless you bring {food}.
